name: Sklearn Logistic Regression
description: Logistic Regression is a linear classification algorithm that supports binary, One-vs-Rest, and multinomial classification with L1, L2, or Elastic-Net regularization.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Target Column
fields.description: Target label column used for training the logistic regression model.

fields.name: featureCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: List of input feature columns containing numeric, boolean, or vector values.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Ratio used to split data into training and testing datasets.

fields.name: penalty
fields.title: Penalty
fields.description: Type of regularization applied to the model coefficients.

fields.name: dual
fields.title: Dual
fields.description: Selects between primal or dual optimization formulation.

fields.name: tol
fields.title: Tol
fields.description: Tolerance threshold used to decide convergence.

fields.name: C
fields.title: C
fields.description: Inverse of regularization strength. Smaller values imply stronger regularization.

fields.name: fit_intercept
fields.title: FitIntercept
fields.description: Specifies whether an intercept term should be added to the model.

fields.name: intercept_scaling
fields.title: InterceptScaling
fields.description: Scaling factor for the intercept when using the liblinear solver.

fields.name: class_weight
fields.title: ClassWeight
fields.description: Dictionary mapping class labels to weights for handling class imbalance.

fields.name: random_state
fields.title: RandomState
fields.description: Seed used by the random number generator for reproducibility.

fields.name: solver
fields.title: Solver
fields.description: Optimization algorithm used to train the logistic regression model.

fields.name: max_iter
fields.title: MaxIter
fields.description: Maximum number of iterations allowed for solver convergence.

fields.name: multi_class
fields.title: MultiClass
fields.description: Strategy for multiclass classification.

fields.name: verbose
fields.title: Verbose
fields.description: Controls verbosity level of the solver output.

fields.name: warm_start
fields.title: WarmStart
fields.description: Reuses solution from previous fit as initialization.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Whether to display confusion matrix visualization.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Description displayed with the confusion matrix chart.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label for actual class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix PredictedLabel Legend
fields.description: Legend label for predicted class values.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label for instance counts.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Save Confusion Matrix Path
fields.description: Filesystem path used to save the confusion matrix.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Business interpretation of confusion matrix rows.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Whether to display ROC curve visualization.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: Title displayed above the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Description displayed along with the ROC curve.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: Label for the X-axis of the ROC curve.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Label for the Y-axis of the ROC curve.
